summary: All previously identified issues have been addressed appropriately with no new blocking problems introduced.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: Allowlist defined but not enforced at message send time
previous_issues_status.notes: Allowlist is now enforced in handleChatMessage via isAddressAllowed.

previous_issues_status.original_issue: Welcome message readOnly status ignored allowlist
previous_issues_status.notes: readOnly now computed from authenticated + allowlist status.
Addresses are normalized and invalid entries are filtered out.
